name: Tuna Noodle Bake
recipeIngredient: 2 cans tuna in water (7 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cooked noodles, tuna, sour cream, milk, mushrooms, salt and pepper in a large bowl.
2. Pour the mixture into an ungreased 2-quart casserole dish.
3. In another small bowl, mix together bread crumbs, grated parmesan cheese, and melted butter.
4. Sprinkle the breadcrumb mixture evenly over the top of the casserole.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 35-40 minutes, or until bubbly.
